    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientGuiMain
    Launches the JavaFX client application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientMain
    Entry point for launching the Mesos client.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.Launcher
    The main entry point that delegates to the JavaFX application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.ServerMain
    Starts the server application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Tools.CheckRmi
    Resolves the registry and performs a lookup on the provided binding.
    manageCards() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Moves cards between rows and draws new cards to keep the table balanced.
    markActivity() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Registers that this client produced activity.
    matchId() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.GameResult
    Returns the unique match identifier.
    MAX_ROUNDS - Static variable in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Total number of rounds in a standard Mesos game.
    modifyPrestigePoints(int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Modifies the player's prestige points by the given delta.
    modifyPrestigePoints(int, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Modifies prestige points with a textual reason for logging.
    MySqlGameResultRepository - Class in it.polimi.Game.Persistence
    JDBC-based repository that stores match results in a MySQL database.
    MySqlGameResultRepository(String, String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.MySqlGameResultRepository
